mapper.select: SELECT a.alert_id, a.device_id, d.device_name, a.alert_type, a.alert_level, a.message, a.status, a.control_action, a.created_at FROM ess_alert a JOIN ess_device d ON a.device_id = d.device_id WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.alert_id, a.device_id, d.device_name, a.alert_type, a.alert_level, a.message, a.status, a.control_action, a.created_at FROM ess_alert a JOIN ess_device d ON a.device_id = d.device_id WHERE a.alert_id = #{alertId} AND d.member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ess_alert ( device_id, alert_type, alert_level, message, status, control_action ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{alertType}, #{alertLevel}, #{message}, #{status}, #{controlAction} )
